alkylation reagent: add 100 μL of iodoacetamide buffer (100 mM iodoacetamide in UA)
cleavage agent: add 40 μL of trypsin buffer (2 μg trypsin in 40 μL of 100 mM NH4HCO3)
collision energy: the normalized collision energy is 27 eV
fractionation method: Peptide was fractionated using SAX or desalted using C18 StageTips
fragmentation method: the MS2 activation type is HCD
instrument: connected to the Q-Exactive mass spectrometer
